titles.text: The Legend of Zelda: Shénqí de Màozi

descriptions.text:
The Legend of Zelda: Shénqí de Màozi is a backport of The Legend of Zelda: The Minish Cap on the Famicom. It was published and developed by Shenzhen Nanjing.

This game has a title hack where the title screen is changed to The Phantom Hourglass.
